scripts.deploy: cd contracts && echo y | npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "CHAIN,BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" "npm run chain" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.fresh: concurrently --names "CHAIN,DEPLOY,BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta,green" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run chain" "npm run deploy && npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
